com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXConnectivity


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXConnectivity
    Interface for accessing connectivity objects.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXAssembly> getAssemblies()
      Get the assemblies associated.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXBlock> getBlocks()
      Get the blocks associated.
      java.util.Set<IXConnector> getConnectors()
      Get the connectors associated.
      java.util.Set<IXDevice> getDevices()
      Get the devices associated.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXFunction> getFunctions()
      Get the functions associated.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXFunctionSignal> getFunctionSignals()
      Get the function signals.
      java.util.Set<IXGround> getGrounds()
      Get ground devices associated.
      java.util.Set<IXHighway> getHighways()
      Get the highways associated.
      java.util.Set<IXInterconnectDevice> getInterconnectDevices()
      Get the interconnect devices associated.
      java.util.Set<IXInterconnect> getInterconnects()
      Get the interconnects associated.
      java.util.Set<IXMulticore> getMulticores()
      Get the multicores associated.
      java.util.Set<IXNet> getNets()
      Get the nets associated.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXRingTerminal> getRingTerminals()
      Get the ring terminals contained in this connectivity object.
      java.util.Set<IXShield> getShields()
      Get the shields associated.
      java.util.Set<IXSplice> getSplices()
      Get the splices associated.
      java.util.Set<IXWire> getWires()
      Get the wires associated.

    • Method Detail

      • getDevices

        java.util.Set<IXDevice> getDevices()
        Get the devices associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of devices associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getBlocks

        java.util.Set<? extends IXBlock> getBlocks()
        Get the blocks associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of blocks associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getInterconnects

        java.util.Set<IXInterconnect> getInterconnects()
        Get the interconnects associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of interconnects associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getInterconnectDevices

        java.util.Set<IXInterconnectDevice> getInterconnectDevices()
        Get the interconnect devices associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of interconnect devices associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

        java.util.Set<IXConnector> getConnectors()
        Get the connectors associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of connectors associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getSplices

        java.util.Set<IXSplice> getSplices()
        Get the splices associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of splices associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getWires

        java.util.Set<IXWire> getWires()
        Get the wires associated.
        Returns:

        Get the multicores associated.

        Get the assemblies associated.

      • getRingTerminals

        java.util.Set<? extends IXRingTerminal> getRingTerminals()
        Get the ring terminals contained in this connectivity object.
        Returns:
        a Set of ring terminals contained if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getFunctions

        java.util.Set<? extends IXFunction> getFunctions()
        Get the functions associated.
        Returns:
        a Set of functions associated if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.
